item.title: Splatoon Raiders Direct set for June 30
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Followed directly by a 30-minute Nintendo Treehouse: Live.

Nintendo will host a Splatoon Raiders Direct followed by Nintendo Treehouse: Live – Splatoon Raiders on June 30 at 7:00 a.m. PT / 10:00 a.m. ET, the company announced.

The Splatoon Raiders Direct will run for roughly 15 minutes and provide more information about the upcoming game. You will be able to watch it on YouTube (America, Europe, Japan) and Twitch.

Nintendo Treehouse: Live – Splatoon Raiders run for around 30 minutes and showcase even more gameplay. You will be able to watch it on YouTube and Twitch.

Splatoon Raiders is due out for Switch 2 on July 23.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/splatoon-raiders-direct-set-for-june-30
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
